scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && (npm run test:app-all &) && npm run test:playwright
scripts.test:ci-chromium-react: (npm run test:app-react &) && wait-on http://localhost:3021 && playwright test --project chromium-react
scripts.test:ci-chromium-vue: (npm run test:app-vue &) && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && playwright test --project chromium-vue
scripts.test:ci-chromium-angular: (npm run test:app-angular &) && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && playwright test --project chromium-angular
scripts.test:ci-firefox-react: (npm run test:app-react &) && wait-on http://localhost:3021 && playwright test --project firefox-react
scripts.test:ci-firefox-vue: (npm run test:app-vue &) && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && playwright test --project firefox-vue
scripts.test:ci-firefox-angular: (npm run test:app-angular &) && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && playwright test --project firefox-angular
scripts.test:ci-webkit-react: (npm run test:app-react &) && wait-on http://localhost:3021 && playwright test --project webkit-react
scripts.test:ci-webkit-vue: (npm run test:app-vue &) && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && playwright test --project webkit-vue
scripts.test:ci-webkit-angular: (npm run test:app-angular &) && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && playwright test --project webkit-angular
scripts.test:playwright: wait-on http://localhost:3021 && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && playwright test
scripts.test:bash: wait-on http://localhost:3021 && wait-on http://localhost:3022 && wait-on http://localhost:3023 && /bin/bash
